name: Sir Bucket
short_description: Sir Bucket is a choose-your-own-adventure game set in a fantasy world with over 30 different endings. Explore the world and have your story told by a wisecracking narrator.
detailed_description:
Sir Bucket is a light-hearted choose your own adventure story game where you as the player work with the narrator who is in desperate need of some home improvements. He desires to revamp his living room with memories of the journeys he goes on, thats where you come in. Living through Sir Bucket to create those memories you will travel across the realm of Elikorus meeting new faces, forging your own journey.

At the end of the day the whole idea of this game is to make you smile, or cry if you do something sad, but mainly smile! Unless you want to smile while you cry, I'm ok with that.


What to expect:
Sir Bucket will be able to move around his environment picking new places to go, and interacting with the environment and people, Most interactions will result in a choice that needs to be made that will affect the outcome of the current playthrough. When an ending is achieved the player will be sent back to the beginning of the game for them to embark on a new journey to achieve a different outcome.
